query:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

final_prompt.prompt:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok) live stream featuring the actress known as 神仙姐姐 (Liu Yifei), holding a handwritten sign during the broadcast.

Style/medium: photorealistic mobile screenshot simulation, mimicking a real Douyin live stream UI with on-screen overlays, comment scrolls, and viewer count badge
Composition: vertical 9:16 portrait frame, medium close-up shot of the host from chest up, centered subject, front-facing camera angle
Subject: a young Chinese woman resembling 神仙姐姐, elegant and radiant, holding up a sign with both hands at chest level; sign reads "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Scene/backdrop: softly blurred indoor live-stream studio background with warm ambient light, subtle ring-light catchlight in eyes
Lighting/mood: soft frontal ring-light illumination, warm and flattering color temperature, upbeat and welcoming mood
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, Douyin signature red/pink UI accent colors, soft neutral background
Materials/textures: matte cardboard sign with handwritten black marker text, natural fabric clothing texture, subtle screen glow
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must include Douyin-style live stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, floating heart animations, scrolling comment bar at bottom, red gift icons); sign text must be legible and centered on the card
Avoid: blurry or illegible sign text, distorted hands or fingers, generic streamer aesthetic without Douyin UI, overexposed skin, watermark artifacts

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为"神仙姐姐"抖音直播间生成一张 9:16 竖版直播截图，模拟真实抖音 App 直播界面风格。

风格/介质:手机截图风格，模拟抖音 App 真实直播界面，包含直播间 UI 元素（顶部主播昵称栏、底部评论弹幕条、点赞心形动画、礼物特效等），整体质感接近真实手机截图
构图:竖构图 9:16，主播居中偏下，直播间 UI 叠加在画面上下两侧，镜头正面平视，类似手机前置摄像头直播视角
主体:神仙姐姐（刘亦菲）形象，长发飘逸，妆容精致，面带微笑，双手捧举一块手写风格白色牌子，牌子正对镜头清晰可读
场景/背景:室内直播间布景，背景柔和，带有补光灯或环形灯的暖光氛围
光线/氛围:正面柔和补光灯，肤色通透，整体氛围温馨亲切，符合明星直播间调性
色彩搭配:抖音 UI 以黑色与白色为主色，点缀抖音品牌红与青双色描边 logo，主播画面以暖肤色为视觉中心
文字(原文保留):"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"（写在主播手持牌子上，字体清晰）
约束:牌子上文字必须完整、清晰、无错字；抖音 UI 元素需符合真实界面布局；画面比例严格 9:16
避免:文字变形或缺字、UI 元素错位、背景杂乱、过度美颜滤镜导致失真、与抖音界面无关的水印

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: mobile screenshot, 9:16 vertical, TikTok (Douyin) live stream UI
Primary request: a realistic Douyin live stream screenshot featuring a beautiful Chinese actress resembling "神仙姐姐" (Liu Yifei-type appearance) holding up a handwritten sign during a live broadcast
Scene/backdrop: indoor live stream setting, soft studio lighting, blurred background with warm ambient glow
Subject: a young Chinese woman with ethereal, fairy-like beauty — delicate features, long black hair, bright eyes, elegant expression — holding a rectangular sign with both hands, facing the camera
Style/medium: photorealistic screenshot, smartphone screen capture aesthetic
Composition/framing: vertical 9:16 portrait, medium close-up, front-facing camera angle, subject centered
Lighting/mood: soft, flattering indoor light, warm and intimate live-stream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, soft whites and pinks, subtle background bokeh
Materials/textures: realistic skin texture, paper/cardboard sign surface with handwritten text
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: the sign must be clearly legible and held prominently in front of the subject; include Douyin-style live stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, comment bubbles, like hearts floating, red gift icons, username bar at bottom)
Avoid: blurry or illegible text on sign, distorted hands, generic stock-photo look, watermark
